listing.title: Former Rite Aid
listing.listed_by: Hanna Commercial Real Estate Cleveland, Commercial Real Estate Exchange

auction.status: Reserve met — will sell to the highest bidder
auction.earnest_money_deposit: Greater of $20,000 or 10% of the Purchase Price
auction.marketing_fee: 5% of the Winning Bid Amount, $20,000 minimum

investment_highlights: Located at a lit intersection with over 14,588 VPD along Liberty Ave
Average Household income exceeds $127,000 within a 5-mile range
Prime for potential redevelopment with over 236' of frontage along Liberty Ave
Site has two full access points, one along Liberty Ave and the other along Salem Drive
description: Former Rite Aid at 4580 Liberty Ave, Vermilion, OH 44089 offers a standout opportunity to acquire a freestanding 11,724 SF building on 1.64 acres. Surrounded by national and regional retailers, restaurants, and service providers, the location is well suited for owner-users, investors, or redevelopment-focused buyers. Area demographics further strengthen the opportunity, with average household income exceeding $127,000 within a 5-mile radius. Nearby residential density, daytime population, and strong community spending power support a wide range of potential uses. Ideal for retail, medical, service, or adaptive reuse, this former Rite Aid combines scale, access, visibility, and redevelopment potential in a desirable Lake Erie area market.

market_research.radius_note: 3-mile radius data not publicly available at granular level; figures are for ZIP 44089 (closest proxy) and 5-mile radius where noted
data_sources: US Census Bureau American Community Survey 2024 (via city-data.com, demographicsbyradius.com)

income.note: Crexi listing cites avg HH income >$127,000 within 5-mile radius (likely uses a different aggregation method)

age.note: Significantly older than Ohio and US averages — mature, established community

crime.source: FBI UCR data via CrimeGrade.org (released Sep 2025)

retail_market.geography: Vermilion, OH (Liberty Ave corridor) / Erie County, OH
retail_market.note: Vermilion is a thin retail market; very limited comparable lease data available publicly

vermilion_specific.sample_property: Portland Plaza, 4486-4496 Liberty Ave (directly near subject property)

retail_market.market_assessment: Vermilion is a small lakeside community with a thin commercial market. At $13/SF/YR, rents are well below Cleveland metro and national averages, consistent with a rural/suburban secondary market. The 11,724 SF subject property is the largest retail space in the local market.
